sql: SELECT device, AVG(temp) AS avg_temp, MAX(temp) AS max_temp, MIN(temp) AS min_temp, AVG(humidity) AS avg_humidity, AVG(co) AS avg_co, AVG(lpg) AS avg_lpg, AVG(smoke) AS avg_smoke, COUNT(*) AS sample_count, window_start() AS window_start, window_end() AS window_end, 'WINDOW_METRICS' AS event_type FROM sensor_stream GROUP BY device, __WIN__
